optionalProofUpdate.reason: No rows were enabled in this sprint. Metadata evidence improves future proof inputs but does not replace parser/validator, fixture writer/reread, UI projection, and temporary Hyprland --verify-config proof. Conflict rows require manual review first, and high-risk rows remain blocked by policy.
